core_payload.content:
# Generative AI Tile Assistant Concept

## 1. Purpose
Define an assistive AI layer that proposes tile design alternatives from style intent, room constraints, and catalog inventory.

## 2. Functional Scope
Interpret natural language prompts, generate multiple variants, and explain tradeoffs in cost and installation complexity.

## 3. Safety
Recommendations remain advisory and traceable with prompt and output provenance preserved.

## 4. Integration
This concept integrates with scanning and layout capsules to provide an auditable end to end design assistant.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Generative AI Tile is archived along with the paused TileSims line instead of remaining an active assistant concept. It still describes a generative design layer that turns style intent into explainable alternatives while preserving tradeoff scoring and provenance for prompts, outputs, and accepted revisions. The concept matters because it captures how AI would fit into a future spatial-design workflow rather than acting as a vague feature wish. In archive mode it becomes preserved product intelligence for later revival.
